revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初一]][[zh:七月初一]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 1|qq=July 1}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} {{ill|July 29|en|July 29|qid=Q2717|lt=July 29|1=July 29}} ) – Japan’s first era name, Taika, was instituted. * {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|qid=Q389180|lt=Kōan|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} 4th Year (leap July) ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1281|en|1281|qid=Q5537|lt=1281|1=1281}} {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Kōan|en|Battle of Kōan|qid=Q2237622|lt=Kōan War|1=Battle of Kōan}} concluded. * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1767|en|1767|qid=Q7672|lt=1767|1=1767}} {{ill|July 26|en|July 26|qid=Q2723|lt=July 26|1=July 26}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieharu|en|Tokugawa Ieharu|qid=Q437518|lt=Tokugawa Ieharu|1=Tokugawa Ieharu}} appointed {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|en|Tanuma Okitsugu|qid=Q521070|lt=Tanuma Okitsugu|1=Tanuma Okitsugu}} as his close aide. * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 7th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1787|en|1787|qid=Q7763|lt=1787|1=1787}} {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}} ) – Edo Shogunate senior councilor {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|en|Matsudaira Sadanobu|qid=Q284038|lt=Matsudaira Sadanobu|1=Matsudaira Sadanobu}} admonished his officials to emulate the reforms of the Kyōhō period, marking the beginning of the Kansei Reforms. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}} ) – Senior councilor {{ill|Abe Masahiro|en|Abe Masahiro|qid=Q1070088|lt=Abe Masahiro|1=Abe Masahiro}} solicited opinions from daimyo and vassals regarding the response to {{ill|Perry (disambiguation)|en|Perry (disambiguation)|qid=Q224607|lt=Commodore Perry|1=Perry (disambiguation)}} , which ultimately undermined the shogunate’s authority.
== Births == * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genwa|1=Yuanhe}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1622|en|1622|qid=Q6815|lt=1622|1=1622}} {{ill|August 7|en|August 7|qid=Q2781|lt=August 7|1=August 7}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yorishige|en|Matsudaira Yorishige|qid=Q3299364|lt=Matsudaira Yorishige|1=Matsudaira Yorishige}} , a daimyo and the first lord of the {{ill|Takamatsu Domain|en|Takamatsu Domain|qid=Q1036915|lt=Takamatsu Domain|1=Takamatsu Domain}} (died {{ill|1695|en|1695|qid=Q7696|lt=1695|1=1695}} ). * {{ill|Tenwa|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442381}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1681|en|1681|qid=Q7645|lt=1681|1=1681}} {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}} ) – {{ill|Asano Yoshinaga (Lord of Hiroshima)|en|Asano Yoshinaga (Lord of Hiroshima)|qid=Q11557324|lt=Asano Yoshinaga|1=Asano Yoshinaga (Lord of Hiroshima)}} , the 5th lord of the {{ill|Hiroshima Domain|en|Hiroshima Domain|qid=Q1141203|lt=Hiroshima Domain|1=Hiroshima Domain}} (died {{ill|1752|en|1752|qid=Q7618|lt=1752|1=1752}} ). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1761|en|1761|qid=Q7649|lt=1761|1=1761}} {{ill|August 1|en|August 1|qid=Q2788|lt=August 1|1=August 1}} ) – {{ill|Sakai Hōitsu|en|Sakai Hōitsu|qid=Q3469342|lt=Sakai Hōiichi|1=Sakai Hōitsu}} , a painter and the younger brother of {{ill|Sakai Tadayoshi|ja|酒井忠以|lt=Sakai Tadayoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayoshi|1=Sakai Tadazane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644101}} , lord of the {{ill|Himeji Domain|en|Himeji Domain|qid=Q1062190|lt=Himeji Domain|1=Himeji Domain}} (died {{ill|1829|en|1829|qid=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Suinin|en|Emperor Suinin|qid=Q314850|lt=Suinin Emperor|1=Emperor Suinin}} 99th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|AD 70|en|AD 70|qid=Q30184|lt=70|1=AD 70}} {{ill|July 26|en|July 26|qid=Q2723|lt=July 26|1=July 26}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Suinin|en|Emperor Suinin|qid=Q314850|lt=Suinin Emperor|1=Emperor Suinin}} , the 11th Emperor (born {{ill|70 BC|en|70 BC|qid=Q41147|lt=70 BCE|1=70 BC}} ). * {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|qid=Q18520676|lt=Hōki|1=Hōki}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|770|en|770|qid=Q25021|lt=770|1=770}} {{ill|July 27|en|July 27|qid=Q2719|lt=July 27|1=July 27}} ) – {{ill|Abe no Nakamaro|en|Abe no Nakamaro|qid=Q479788|lt=Abe no Nakamaro|1=Abe no Nakamaro}} , an envoy student to Tang China. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1585|en|1585|qid=Q6736|lt=1585|1=1585}} {{ill|July 27|en|July 27|qid=Q2719|lt=July 27|1=July 27}} ) – {{ill|Ichijō Kanesada|en|Ichijō Kanesada|qid=Q370505|lt=Ichijō Kanesada|1=Ichijō Kanesada}} , the governor of {{ill|Tosa Province|en|Tosa Province|qid=Q857330|lt=Tosa Province|1=Tosa Province}} . * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genwa|1=Yuanhe}} 8th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1622|en|1622|qid=Q6815|lt=1622|1=1622}} {{ill|August 7|en|August 7|qid=Q2781|lt=August 7|1=August 7}} ) – {{ill|Hasekura Tsunenaga|en|Hasekura Tsunenaga|qid=Q244764|lt=Hasekura Tsunenaga|1=Hasekura Tsunenaga}} , a samurai of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|qid=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}} and the head of the Japanese delegation to Europe (died {{ill|1571|en|1571|qid=Q6666|lt=1571|1=1571}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|30|7|2|6|1|8|7|0701|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 7월 1일]] [[ja:7月1日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:七月初一]]
[[ar:July 1 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月初一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月初一]] {{wikidata link|Q839711}} [[Category:Days 1 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar July]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
